name: WF-02-recipe Extract Recipe Data

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { title: $json.body.title || '', description: $json.body.description || '', video_id: $json.body.videoId || '', youtube_channel: $json.body.youtubeChannel || '', video_url: 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=' + ($json.body.videoId || ''), thumbnail_url: $json.body.thumbnail || '', published_date: $json.body.publishedAt || '' } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, recipe_id: $json.recipe_id, video_id: $json.video_id, title: $json.title, docx_path: $json.docx_path, pdf_path: $json.pdf_path, nextcloud_docx_url: $json.nextcloud_docx_url, nextcloud_pdf_url: $json.nextcloud_pdf_url } }}

description: Transcribe one YouTube video, extract a Ukrainian recipe, generate DOCX/PDF, upload to Nextcloud, then respond
